label: Study 4h minimum
description: Complete at least 4 hours of focused study

label: No social media
description: Zero social media during study blocks

label: GitHub commit
description: At least one meaningful GitHub commit today

label: Exercise
description: Any physical activity — gym, run, walk

label: Review yesterday's notes
description: Spend 5–10 minutes reviewing what you learned yesterday

label: Sleep 7h+
description: You can't learn when you're running on fumes

label: Write technical notes
description: Document at least one thing you learned today in writing
